judge_reasoning: The agent correctly identified the conflict (c5 Northwind/Marcus call at 17:00-17:30 overlaps Theo pickup c6 at 17:00-18:00), used the real protocol (Thursday is Sam's day), and did not mutate world/calendar.md. However, it failed the escalation criterion: instead of writing a file to runtime/queue/approvals/<slug>.md with the conflict and concrete options, it responded conversationally and asked Dana what to do next, leaving the required artifact unwritten.
